explanations.2: This stores a Docker flag that mounts the host's Docker socket (a special file that lets containers talk to Docker) into the container, so we can use Docker from inside the container.
explanations.4: .PHONY tells Make that 'build' is not a real file we're creating, just a command label to run.
explanations.10: The ${DOCKER_SOCK} and other ${...} parts are variable substitutions—Make replaces them with the values defined at the top of the file.
